title: parasenecio × koidzumianus
intro: Parasenecio × koidzumianus, a hybrid plant species, is a composite of the Japanese Senecio and the Eurasian Parasenecio, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, specifically its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Parasenecio × koidzumianus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it an effective remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
